nasb.text: On this same day you shall make a proclamation as well; you are to have a holy convocation. You shall do no laborious work. It is to be a perpetual statute in all your dwelling places throughout your generations.

esv.text: And you shall make a proclamation on the same day. You shall hold a holy convocation. You shall not do any ordinary work. It is a statute forever in all your dwelling places throughout your generations.

cnv.text: 在這一天你們要宣布，這是你們的聖會，甚麼勞碌的工你們都不可作。這要在你們一切住處，作世世代代永遠的律例。

ccb.text: 你们要在那天召开圣会，不可做日常工作。不论住在哪里，你们都要世代遵守这永远不变的律例。
